seo.title: Next.js implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Next.js projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist provides a technical verification framework for Next.js applications, ensuring stability, security, and performance before deploying to production environments like Vercel or self-hosted VPS.

items.title: Validate ISR Revalidation
items.description: Verify that revalidatePath or revalidateTag is called within Server Actions following any data mutation to clear stale cache.

items.title: Audit Parallel Data Fetching
items.description: Identify sequential 'await' calls in Server Components and replace them with Promise.all() or individual Suspense boundaries to prevent waterfalls.

items.title: Configure unstable_cache
items.description: Wrap database queries (Prisma/Drizzle) in unstable_cache to ensure results are cached across requests rather than refetched on every render.

items.title: Set Default Fetch Cache Policies
items.description: Explicitly set fetch('url', { cache: 'no-store' }) for real-time data or 'force-cache' for static assets to avoid default behavior ambiguity.

items.title: Implement Loading States
items.description: Ensure every route segment has a loading.tsx file or manual Suspense boundary to prevent blank screens during async operations.

items.title: Server Action Input Validation
items.description: Use a schema library like Zod to parse and validate all arguments passed to 'use server' functions before processing.

items.title: Environment Variable Scoping
items.description: Audit .env files to ensure sensitive keys (OpenAI, Stripe secret) are NOT prefixed with NEXT_PUBLIC_ to prevent browser exposure.

items.title: Middleware Session Verification
items.description: Implement route protection in middleware.ts to redirect unauthenticated users before they hit Server Component rendering logic.

items.title: CSRF Protection for Actions
items.description: Verify that Server Actions check the Origin header against the host domain to prevent cross-site request forgery.

items.title: Auth.js/Clerk Server Checks
items.description: Verify that session checks (auth() or getAuth()) are performed in the Server Component body, not just the client-side UI.

items.title: Image Optimization Audit
items.description: Ensure next/image components have 'priority' set for LCP elements and utilize 'placeholder="blur"' for large hero images.

items.title: Font Subsetting
items.description: Configure next/font to use specific subsets (e.g., 'latin') and swap display properties to minimize Layout Shift (CLS).

items.title: Bundle Analysis
items.description: Run @next/bundle-analyzer and move heavy client-side libraries (e.g., Lucide, Lodash) to Server Components or dynamic imports.

items.title: Script Loading Strategy
items.description: Review third-party scripts in layout.tsx and assign 'strategy="lazyOnload"' or 'strategy="afterInteractive"' appropriately.

items.title: Route Segment Config
items.description: Explicitly define 'export const dynamic = "force-static"' for pages that do not require per-request data to optimize build-time generation.

items.title: Dynamic Metadata Implementation
items.description: Implement generateMetadata() in dynamic routes ([id]) to populate unique titles and descriptions for search engine crawlers.

items.title: Sitemap and Robots Generation
items.description: Verify that sitemap.ts and robots.ts files are present in the app directory and returning valid XML/text content.

items.title: Canonical URL Configuration
items.description: Set a base metadata URL in the root layout to ensure all generated canonical tags use the correct production domain.

items.title: Open Graph Image Validation
items.description: Test dynamic OG images using the Vercel OG library to ensure social shares display correct preview content.

items.title: Semantic HTML Audit
items.description: Ensure only one H1 exists per page and that the document structure follows a logical heading hierarchy (H2-H6).

items.title: Stream Response Handling
items.description: Verify that AI SDK responses use 'StreamingTextResponse' and the frontend utilizes 'useChat' or 'useCompletion' for real-time UI updates.

items.title: Action Execution Timeout
items.description: Increase the 'maxDuration' config in route.ts or page.tsx for AI routes to prevent functions from timing out during long LLM generations.

items.title: Rate Limit Implementation
items.description: Apply middleware-based rate limiting using Upstash Redis to prevent AI API credit exhaustion from automated bots.

items.title: Edge Runtime Compatibility
items.description: Verify that AI routes use 'export const runtime = "edge"' if they require minimal latency and support the Edge runtime environment.

items.title: Fallback UI for API Failures
items.description: Implement try/catch blocks in Server Actions that return user-friendly error messages when AI providers hit rate limits.

items.title: Global Error Boundary
items.description: Create a root error.tsx file to catch unhandled exceptions and provide a 'reset' functionality to the user.

items.title: 404 Not Found Handling
items.description: Use the notFound() function in dynamic segments and ensure a custom not-found.tsx is styled and functional.

items.title: Production Logging Integration
items.description: Connect a service like Sentry or Axiom to capture server-side console errors that are otherwise invisible in production.

items.title: Health Check Endpoint
items.description: Create an /api/health route that checks database connectivity to allow external monitors to verify service uptime.

items.title: Source Map Verification
items.description: Ensure production builds generate source maps for error tracking but keep them restricted from public access.
